euConsent.title: EU/EEA Consumer Notice
euConsent.immediateDelivery: I request immediate access to the digital content and consent to delivery before the expiry of the 14-day withdrawal period.
euConsent.waiverAcknowledged: I understand that by requesting immediate delivery, I lose my right to withdraw from this contract within 14 days (right of withdrawal under EU Consumer Rights Directive Art. 16(m)).
euConsent.required: Both consents are required to proceed with purchase.

settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action has a 30-day grace period.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Account
deleteDialog.description: This will schedule your account for permanent deletion in 30 days. Your data will be permanently removed after that period. This action cannot be undone.
